info.name: HealthCareGov Microservices API
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for the HealthCareGov microservices platform.

Setup:
1. Set variable base_url = http://localhost:8080
2. Login using any Auth request
3. Copy the 'token' value from response
4. Set variable jwt_token = <copied token>
5. All other requests use Bearer {{jwt_token}} automatically

variable.description: Login first, then paste token here

item.name: 🔐 Authentication
item.description: Login endpoints — no JWT required. Copy the returned token value to jwt_token variable.

request.description: Returns JWT token. Copy token value to jwt_token variable.

item.name: 👤 User Management
item.description: Admin endpoints: manage user lifecycle — view, create, approve, reject, deactivate.

request.description: Returns all users. Admin role required.
Changes user status to Active. Admin role required.
No JWT required. Patient is created with status=Pending until admin approves.

item.name: 📅 Schedule Management
item.description: Doctor schedule slot creation and management.

request.description: Doctor creates an available time slot. Unique constraint: doctorId+date+timeSlot.
Cannot update if slot is already Booked.
View all schedule slots for a specific doctor.

item.name: 📋 Appointment Booking
item.description: Patient appointment booking, cancellation, admin check-in and reassignment.

request.description: Slot must be Available. Creates Confirmed appointment and sets slot to Booked.
Reverts schedule slot to Available and sets appointment status to Cancelled.
View all appointments. Admin role typically used.
Reassign appointment to a different doctor. Admin action.
Updates appointment status to Arrived. Admin action.

item.name: 🏢 Hospital Management
item.description: Admin: Create, read, update, delete hospitals.

request.description: Admin creates a new hospital record.
Search by name or location (case-insensitive partial match).
Returns 204 No Content on success. Fails if referenced by resources.

item.name: 🛏️ Resource Management
item.description: Admin: Manage hospital resources (Beds, Equipment, Staff).

item.name: 📊 Analytics
item.description: Hospital analytics dashboard — totals across all hospitals.

request.description: Returns totalHospitals, totalBeds, totalEquipment, totalStaff, totalCapacity.

item.name: 💊 Treatment & Records
item.description: Doctor: Record treatments and update patient medical records.

request.description: Doctor records a treatment. Also updates/creates MedicalRecord with appended diagnosis.

body.raw:
{
  "patientId": 1,
  "doctorId": 2,
  "diagnosis": "Acute Pharyngitis",
  "prescription": "Amoxicillin 500mg x 5 days",
  "treatmentNotes": "Patient presented with sore throat and fever. Follow up in 7 days.",
  "status": "Active"
}

{
  "patientId": 1,
  "doctorId": 2,
  "diagnosis": "Hypertension Review",
  "prescription": "Amlodipine 5mg daily",
  "treatmentNotes": "BP under control. Continue medication.",
  "status": "Completed"
}

request.description: Returns full treatment history for a patient.
Only Doctor or Admin can update. Cannot update if status=Finalized.

item.name: 🔔 Notifications
item.description: Send and retrieve notifications by user.

request.description: Internally used by services. Category: Appointment|Treatment|Compliance
Returns all notifications for userId=1, newest first.
Changes notification status from Unread to Read.

item.name: 📈 Program Reports
item.description: Program Manager: View KPI dashboard and generate scoped reports.

request.description: Full KPI dashboard: appointments, treatments, hospitals, compliance counts.
Scope options: Appointment | Treatment | Hospital | Compliance

item.name: ✅ Compliance Records
item.description: Compliance Officer: Create/update compliance records, view audit logs.

request.description: Type: Appointment|Treatment|Hospital  |  Result: Pass|Fail
Returns all compliance records. All filter params optional.
Returns all system audit log entries (userId, action, resource, timestamp).

item.name: 🔍 Audit Management
item.description: Government Auditor: Create audits, update status (Scheduled→In-Progress→Completed), view details.

request.description: Status always defaults to Scheduled regardless of input. Transition: Scheduled→In-Progress→Completed
Returns all audits. Optional ?status= filter.
